summary: Add DefaultEncryptedCachePath, ResolveCachePath, and supportDir helpers; teach LoadCache to prefer cache-v6.json.enc over the plaintext stub via the resolver. GRANOLA_CACHE_PATH override continues to win. Decrypt failures surface as wrapped errors (no silent fallback to stale plaintext, per plan D2). Updated existing TestLoadCache_RealFile to account for the schema-shift where documents moved out of the cache; added 4 resolver tests + an integration test gated by GRANOLA_INTEGRATION=1.
reason: Same root cause as safestorage-package. LoadCache was the load-bearing entry point for every command that reads the cache; without this change the safestorage package would never be invoked.
